title: tephrosia uniflora
intro: Tephrosia uniflora, also known as the one-flowered milk bush, is a plant species native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia uniflora include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use in treating wounds and promoting tissue repair. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia uniflora include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
